title: Reference no-reopen: persons load, build, lookup (no close/reopen), 1m
description: No-reopen variant of the reference lifecycle experiment. workload.options.reopenAfterBuild=false keeps the connection/sequence live after Build(), eliminating close/reopen/refresh overhead. This isolates the cost of the reopen step in the normal persisted storage lifecycle.

dataset.notes: Synthetic persons(id,name,age) dataset for controlled storage-engine measurement.

workload.notes: Reverse bulk load, build/stabilize, direct lookup, deterministic random point lookup batch. No close/reopen after build.

fault.notes: No fault injection in this executable catalog experiment.

fairness.notes: Targets should use equivalent durable persisted semantics.

runs.notes: Default local profile. CLI may override.
